fields.label: Default Raw Material Warehouse
fields.description: Default warehouse for storing raw materials (e.g. Stores)

fields.label: Default Finished Goods Warehouse
fields.description: Default warehouse for storing finished goods

fields.label: Job Work Outward Warehouse
fields.description: Warehouse for materials sent to suppliers for job work

fields.label: Customer JW Parent Warehouse
fields.description: Parent group warehouse for customer job work inward materials

fields.label: Customer JW Completed Warehouse
fields.description: Warehouse for completed customer job work goods awaiting delivery

fields.label: Machine Extra Pay Rate
fields.description: Amount paid per extra machine operated (used in payroll)

fields.label: Min Production for Extra Machine (Kg)
fields.description: Minimum production in Kg to count a machine as active for extra pay

fields.label: Customer Provided Item Suffix
fields.description: Suffix appended to yarn item codes for customer-provided variants
